    Severity: ERROR

    MessageText: structure of query does not match function result type
    Detail: Detail redacted as it may contain sensitive data. Specify 'Include Error Detail' in the connection string to include this information.
    Where: SQL statement "WITH required_docs AS (
    SELECT
        cr.id AS config_request_id,
        cr.collection_id,
        dt.id AS document_id,
        dt.label AS document_name
    FROM config_requests cr

    INNER JOIN collection_document_types cdt
        ON cdt.collection_id = cr.collection_id

    INNER JOIN document_types dt
        ON dt.id = cdt.doc_type_id

    WHERE
        (
            p_config_id IS NULL
            OR cr.id = p_config_id
        )
),

    uploaded_docs_cte AS (
        SELECT
            od.recipient_id,
            od.document_type_id,
            MAX(od.uploaded_at) AS uploaded_at
        FROM onboarding_documents od
        WHERE COALESCE(od.status, 'active') <> 'archived'
		AND od.source IN (
                'candidate_upload'
            )
        GROUP BY od.recipient_id, od.document_type_id
    ),


	 candidate_counts AS (
    				SELECT
        			r.id AS recipient_id,

        			COUNT(DISTINCT rd.document_id) AS total_required_docs,

        			COUNT(DISTINCT ud.document_type_id) AS uploaded_docs

    				FROM config_request_recipients r

    				INNER JOIN config_requests cr
        				ON cr.id = r.config_id

    				INNER JOIN required_docs rd
       					 ON rd.config_request_id = cr.id

    				LEFT JOIN uploaded_docs_cte ud
        				ON ud.recipient_id = r.id
        				AND ud.document_type_id = rd.document_id


				WHERE
            (
                p_config_id IS NULL
                OR cr.id = p_config_id
            )

            AND
            (
                p_region IS NULL
                OR LOWER(
                    (
                        SELECT dc.region
                        FROM doc_collection dc
                        WHERE dc.id = cr.collection_id
                    )
                ) = LOWER(p_region)
            )

            AND
            (
                p_from_date IS NULL
                OR cr.created_at >= p_from_date
            )

            AND
            (
                p_to_date IS NULL
                OR cr.created_at <= p_to_date
            )

    			GROUP BY r.id),

    candidate_doc_status AS (
        SELECT
            r.id AS recipient_id,
            COALESCE(
                NULLIF(r.name, ''),
                'Unknown'
            )::TEXT AS candidate_name,

            r.email::TEXT AS email,

            COALESCE(
                dc.region,
                'Unknown'
            )::TEXT AS region,

            COALESCE(
                cr.config_name,
                'Unknown'
            )::TEXT AS config_name,

            COALESCE(
                r.status,
                'pending'
            )::TEXT AS overall_status,

            rd.document_name::TEXT AS document_name,

            cc.total_required_docs,

            cc.uploaded_docs,
			COALESCE(r.is_hired, false) AS is_hired,

            CASE
                WHEN ud.document_type_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Uploaded'
                ELSE 'pending'
            END::TEXT AS document_status,

            ud.uploaded_at

	
        FROM config_request_recipients r
		
		
		INNER JOIN candidate_counts cc
    			ON cc.recipient_id = r.id
        INNER JOIN config_requests cr
            ON cr.id = r.config_id
	
		INNER JOIN doc_collection dc 
			on dc.id=cr.collection_id


        INNER JOIN required_docs rd
            ON rd.config_request_id = cr.id

        LEFT JOIN uploaded_docs_cte ud
            ON ud.recipient_id = r.id
            AND ud.document_type_id = rd.document_id

        WHERE
            (
                p_config_id IS NULL
                OR cr.id = p_config_id
            )

            AND
            (
                p_region IS NULL
                OR LOWER(dc.region) = LOWER(p_region)
            )

            AND
            (
                p_from_date IS NULL
                OR cr.created_at >= p_from_date
            )

            AND
            (
                p_to_date IS NULL
                OR cr.created_at <= p_to_date
            )
    ),

    final_data AS (
        SELECT
            cds.*,

            (cds.total_required_docs - cds.uploaded_docs)
                AS pending_docs,

            ROUND(
                (
                    cds.uploaded_docs::NUMERIC
                    / NULLIF(cds.total_required_docs, 0)
                ) * 100,
                2
            ) AS completion_percent
--,
--
--            CASE
--                WHEN cds.uploaded_docs = cds.total_required_docs
--                    THEN 'completed'
--
--                WHEN cds.uploaded_docs > 0
--                    THEN 'inProgress'
--
--                ELSE 'pending'
--            END::TEXT AS overall_status

        FROM candidate_doc_status cds
    )

    SELECT
        fd.recipient_id,
        fd.candidate_name,
        fd.email,
        fd.region,
        fd.config_name,
        fd.overall_status,
		fd.is_hired,
        fd.document_name,
        fd.document_status,
        fd.uploaded_at,
        fd.total_required_docs,
        fd.uploaded_docs,
        fd.pending_docs,
        fd.completion_percent

    FROM final_data fd

    WHERE
        (
            p_status IS NULL
            OR LOWER(fd.overall_status) = LOWER(p_status)
        )

    ORDER BY
        fd.region,
        fd.candidate_name,
        fd.document_name"

    				INNER JOIN required_docs rd

    			GROUP BY r.id),

    candidate_doc_status AS (
        SELECT
            r.id AS recipient_id,
            COALESCE(
                NULLIF(r.name, ''),
                'Unknown'
            )::TEXT AS candidate_name,

            r.email::TEXT AS email,

            COALESCE(
                dc.region,
                'Unknown'
            )::TEXT AS region,

            COALESCE(
                cr.config_name,
                'Unknown'
            )::TEXT AS config_name,

            COALESCE(
                r.status,
                'pending'
            )::TEXT AS overall_status,

            rd.document_name::TEXT AS document_name,

            cc.total_required_docs,

            cc.uploaded_docs,
			COALESCE(r.is_hired, false) AS is_hired,

            CASE
                WHEN ud.document_type_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Uploaded'
                ELSE 'pending'
            END::TEXT AS document_status,

            ud.uploaded_at

	
        FROM config_request_recipients r
		
		
		INNER JOIN candidate_counts cc
    			ON cc.recipient_id = r.id
        INNER JOIN config_requests cr
            ON cr.id = r.config_id
	
		INNER JOIN doc_collection dc 
			on dc.id=cr.collection_id


        INNER JOIN required_docs rd
            ON rd.config_request_id = cr.id

        LEFT JOIN uploaded_docs_cte ud
            ON ud.recipient_id = r.id
            AND ud.document_type_id = rd.document_id

        WHERE
            (
                p_config_id IS NULL
                OR cr.id = p_config_id
            )

            AND
            (
                p_region IS NULL
                OR LOWER(dc.region) = LOWER(p_region)
            )

            AND
            (
                p_from_date IS NULL
                OR cr.created_at >= p_from_date
            )

            AND
            (
                p_to_date IS NULL
                OR cr.created_at <= p_to_date
            )
    ),

    final_data AS (
        SELECT
            cds.*,

            (cds.total_required_docs - cds.uploaded_docs)
                AS pending_docs,

            ROUND(
                (
                    cds.uploaded_docs::NUMERIC
                    / NULLIF(cds.total_required_docs, 0)
                ) * 100,
                2
            ) AS completion_percent
--,
--
--            CASE
--                WHEN cds.uploaded_docs = cds.total_required_docs
--                    THEN 'completed'
--
--                WHEN cds.uploaded_docs > 0
--                    THEN 'inProgress'
--
--                ELSE 'pending'
--            END::TEXT AS overall_status

        FROM candidate_doc_status cds
    )

    SELECT
        fd.recipient_id,
        fd.candidate_name,
        fd.email,
        fd.region,
        fd.config_name,
        fd.overall_status,
		fd.is_hired,
        fd.document_name,
        fd.document_status,
        fd.uploaded_at,
        fd.total_required_docs,
        fd.uploaded_docs,
        fd.pending_docs,
        fd.completion_percent

    FROM final_data fd

    WHERE
        (
            p_status IS NULL
            OR LOWER(fd.overall_status) = LOWER(p_status)
        )

    ORDER BY
        fd.region,
        fd.candidate_name,
        fd.document_name"
PL/pgSQL function sp_export_onboarding_report(text,text,text,bigint,timestamp without time zone,timestamp without time zone) line 5 at RETURN QUERY
    File: attmap.c
    Line: 124
    Routine: build_attrmap_by_position
